sutta: the buddha said monks these 10 things are desirable dear charming hard to win in the world what 10 wealth is desirable dear charming heart to win in the world beauty health virtue the holy life friends much knowledge wisdom teachings the heaven worlds are desirable dear charming heart to win in the world these are the 10. stop here for a moment nah do you just have a look at this wealth everybody wants wealth it's hard to get beauty also especially women like to have beauty also hard to get health health also sometimes we take health for granted now but sometimes our health fails virtue holy life holy life that means a spiritual life becoming a monk or a nun and then friends then much knowledge and wisdom and the teachings the heaven wills all these are hard to to attain then the buddha said monks to these 10 things desirable dear charming heart to win in the world 10 things are obstacles sloth and non-exertion is an obstacle to wealth lack of finery and adornment is an obstacle to beauty not exercising regularly is an obstacle to health friendship with the wicked is an obstacle to virtue non-restraint of the sense faculties is an obstacle to the holy life quarreling is an obstacle to having friends failure to repeat is an obstacle to much knowledge not to lend an ear and ask questions is an obstacle to wisdom lack of study and investigation is an obstacle to teaching wrong practice is an obstacle to gaining the heavens these are the 10 obstacles to these 10 things which are desirable dear charming hard to win in the world monks 10 things are helps to these 10 things which are desirable dear charming heart to win in the world what are the 10 energy and exertion are helps to getting wealth finery and adornment are helps to beauty regular exercise is a help to health a lovely friendship is a help to virtue restraint of the sense faculties is a help to the holy life not quarreling is a help to friendship repetition is a help to much knowledge landing an ear and asking questions are helps to wisdom study and investigation are helps to teaching right practice is a help to the heaven world these are the 10 helps to these 10 things which are desirable dear charming hard to win in the world that's the end of the suta
commentary: so you see these 10 things most people want so here the buddha is telling us how to get them if you want to have wealth then you have to have energy and exertion you have to work very hard a lot of people they want to pray for for for wealth but it doesn't come that way we have to work very hard and then finally an adornment helps to build if you want to look beautiful then we have to make up and adorn the body then it looks beautiful regular exercise is a help to health nowadays people tend not to exercise so much when we were young younger you find that a lot of people they earn their livelihood by working very hard and sweating nowadays uh people push the pen as they say that's all the exercise they do push the pen so not much exercise so we need to take exercise otherwise we cannot be healthy 1 suggestion is you come to alvihar plenty of exercise a lovely friendship is a help towards you if you have a good friend a good friend who will guide you the virtuous way then another day you can go to heaven i have a good rebirth and then you'll be very thankful to him restraint of the sense faculties is a help to the holy life you have to guard our 6 senses if you want to practice the holy life not quarreling is a help to friendship if you want to retain our friends we don't want to be quarrelsome repetition is a help to much knowledge this was especially true during the buddha's time when they did not have books so you have to repeat whatever you learn to remember and have much knowledge lending an ear and asking questions helps to wisdom if we want to have wisdom we need to hear properly and ask questions whatever we don't understand maybe we should answer and then we will know more study and investigation are helps to teaching if we want to teach and then we have to study and investigate properly and then only we can teach others right practice is a help to the heaven world that means doing the right things for example uh keeping your sila keeping your precepts having good moral conduct and then the second thing is generosity these 2 are very important if we want to have rebirth in the heaven worlds moral conduct and generosity or charity now the suta is
